creator: me@svmhdvn.name
text:
I have tested a successful build of openldap with the sasl@noldap flavour and a build of cyrus-imapd with openldap support enabled and a sasl@default flavor enabled. They are both able to coexist as what I observed. Please let me know the testing you need me to do and I can verify that it works. As I understand, the purpose of FLAVOR as suggested by the handbook is to allow multiple simultaneous installations of the same port with different build profiles to coexist.

I can easily add a nomysql flavor to my patch and resubmit.
